description: OpenShift Pipelines Chains signing performance. Tracks signing throughput, duration, Chains controller resources, and cluster health across different test_total values (500, 1000, 1500).

panels.description: PipelineRun signing throughput (signed runs per second). Higher is better. Computed as signed_count / signing_window_duration.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_PipelineRuns_signing_throughput')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pr_throughput
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__results_PipelineRuns_signing_throughput'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pr_throughput @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  pr_throughput AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: PipelineRun Signing Throughput

panels.description: TaskRun signing throughput (signed runs per second). Higher is better. Computed as signed_count / signing_window_duration.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_TaskRuns_signing_throughput')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS tr_throughput
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__results_TaskRuns_signing_throughput'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'tr_throughput @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  tr_throughput AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: TaskRun Signing Throughput

panels.description: Total wall-clock time of the PipelineRun signing window (last signed_at - first signed_at). Lower is better — indicates how quickly Chains processes the entire batch.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_PipelineRuns_signing_duration')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pr_sign_duration
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__results_PipelineRuns_signing_duration'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pr_sign_duration @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  pr_sign_duration AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: TaskRun Signing Duration

panels.description:
PipelineRun signing outcome breakdown:
- **pr_signed**: successfully signed
- **pr_unsigned**: never signed (still pending)
- **pr_sign_failed**: signing attempted but failed

All runs should be signed; any unsigned or failed entries indicate a problem.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_PipelineRuns_signing_count_signed_false')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pr_sign_failed,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_PipelineRuns_signing_count_signed_true')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pr_signed,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_PipelineRuns_signing_count_unsigned')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pr_unsigned
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__results_PipelineRuns_signing_count_signed_false'
    AND label_values ? '__results_PipelineRuns_signing_count_signed_true'
    AND label_values ? '__results_PipelineRuns_signing_count_unsigned'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pr_sign_failed @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  pr_sign_failed AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pr_signed @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  pr_signed AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pr_unsigned @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  pr_unsigned AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: TaskRun Signed Count

panels.description: Total PipelineRuns that completed successfully, averaged per day per test_total.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__results_PipelineRuns_count_succeeded')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pr_succeeded
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__results_PipelineRuns_count_succeeded'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pr_succeeded @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  pr_succeeded AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: PipelineRun Succeeded

panels.title: TaskRun Failed

panels.description:
Tekton Chains controller CPU usage in CPU cores (e.g. 0.5 = 500 millicores).
- **cpu_mean**: average over the test window
- **cpu_max**: peak usage

High CPU indicates signing is compute-bound (e.g. cryptographic operations).

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonChainsController_cpu_max')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS cpu_max,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonChainsController_cpu_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS cpu_mean
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonChainsController_cpu_max'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonChainsController_cpu_mean'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'cpu_max @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  cpu_max AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'cpu_mean @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  cpu_mean AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Chains Controller CPU Usage

panels.description:
Tekton Chains controller memory (RSS) usage.
- **mem_mean**: average over the test window
- **mem_max**: peak usage

Growing memory may indicate leaks or large attestation payloads.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonChainsController_memory_max')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS mem_max,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonChainsController_memory_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS mem_mean
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonChainsController_memory_max'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonChainsController_memory_mean'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'mem_max @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  mem_max AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'mem_mean @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  mem_mean AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Chains Controller Memory Usage

panels.description:
Chains controller workqueue depth.
- **wq_mean**: average queue depth during the test
- **wq_max**: peak queue depth

A growing workqueue means the controller cannot sign runs fast enough. Sustained high values indicate a bottleneck.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonChainsControllerWorkqueueDepth_max')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS wq_max,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonChainsControllerWorkqueueDepth_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS wq_mean
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonChainsControllerWorkqueueDepth_max'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonChainsControllerWorkqueueDepth_mean'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'wq_max @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  wq_max AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'wq_mean @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  wq_mean AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Chains Controller Workqueue Depth

panels.description: Number of Chains controller Pod restarts during the test. Should be 0. Restarts during signing cause missed or delayed signatures.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonChainsController_restarts_range')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS chains_restarts
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonChainsController_restarts_range'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'chains_restarts @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  chains_restarts AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Chains Controller Restarts

  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))

panels.title: Cluster Memory Usage

panels.description:
Mean CPU usage of OpenShift and Kubernetes API servers.
- **apiserver_cpu**: openshift-apiserver
- **kube_apiserver_cpu**: kube-apiserver

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_apiserver_cpu_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS apiserver_cpu,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_kubeApiserver_cpu_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS kube_apiserver_cpu
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_apiserver_cpu_mean'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_kubeApiserver_cpu_mean'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'apiserver_cpu @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  apiserver_cpu AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'kube_apiserver_cpu @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  kube_apiserver_cpu AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: API Server Memory Usage (Mean)

panels.description:
Mean etcd MVCC database size.
- **db_total**: total allocated size on disk
- **db_in_use**: logical size of live data

Chains stores signing metadata in annotations, which increases etcd load.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_etcdMvccDbTotalSizeInUseInBytesAverage_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS db_in_use,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_etcdMvccDbTotalSizeInBytesAverage_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS db_total
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_etcdMvccDbTotalSizeInUseInBytesAverage_mean'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_etcdMvccDbTotalSizeInBytesAverage_mean'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'db_in_use @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  db_in_use AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'db_total @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  db_total AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: etcd MVCC DB Size (Mean)

panels.description:
Mean and peak etcd request duration.
- **req_duration_mean**: average latency
- **req_duration_max**: worst-case latency

High values indicate etcd pressure from Chains annotation writes.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_etcdRequestDurationSecondsAverage_max')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS req_duration_max,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_etcdRequestDurationSecondsAverage_mean')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS req_duration_mean
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_etcdRequestDurationSecondsAverage_max'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_etcdRequestDurationSecondsAverage_mean'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'req_duration_max @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  req_duration_max AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'req_duration_mean @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  req_duration_mean AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: etcd Request Duration

panels.description: Restart counts for infrastructure components. All should be 0.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_apiserver_restarts_range')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS apiserver,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_etcd_restarts_range')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS etcd,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_kubeApiserver_restarts_range')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS kube_apiserver
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_apiserver_restarts_range'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_etcd_restarts_range'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_kubeApiserver_restarts_range'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'apiserver @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  apiserver AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'etcd @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  etcd AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'kube_apiserver @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  kube_apiserver AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Infrastructure Restarts

panels.description:
Restart counts for Tekton Pipelines components. All should be 0.

Note: Chains controller restarts are shown separately in the Chains Controller section above.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonPipelinesController_restarts_range')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pipelines_ctrl,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonPipelinesWebhook_restarts_range')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pipelines_webhook,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_tektonOperatorProxyWebhook_restarts_range')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS proxy_webhook
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonPipelinesController_restarts_range'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonPipelinesWebhook_restarts_range'
    AND label_values ? '__measurements_tektonOperatorProxyWebhook_restarts_range'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pipelines_ctrl @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  pipelines_ctrl AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pipelines_webhook @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  pipelines_webhook AS value
FROM daily_agg


UNION ALL

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'proxy_webhook @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  proxy_webhook AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Tekton Component Restarts

panels.description: Range of pending pods in the kube-scheduler queue. High values indicate scheduling pressure.

targets.rawSql:
WITH daily_agg AS (
  SELECT
    DATE_TRUNC('day', start) AS day,
    (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total,
    AVG((label_values->>'__measurements_schedulerPendingPodsCount_range')::DOUBLE PRECISION) AS pending_pods
  FROM data
  WHERE horreum_testid = 418
    AND $__timeFilter(start)
    AND (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER IN ($test_total)

    AND (
  ('$deploy_config' = 'standard' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false))
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'qbt' AND (NOT (label_values ? '__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled') OR (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = false) AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$deploy_config' = 'ha-qbt' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_haConfig_haEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true AND (label_values ? '__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_qbtConfig_qbtEnabled')::BOOLEAN = true)
)

    AND (
  ('$version' = 'nightly' AND (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true)
  OR ('$version' != 'nightly' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') = '$version')
)

    AND label_values ? '__measurements_schedulerPendingPodsCount_range'
  GROUP BY day, test_total
)

SELECT
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM day) AS time,
  'pending_pods @ ' || test_total AS metric,
  pending_pods AS value
FROM daily_agg


ORDER BY time, metric;

panels.title: Scheduler Pending Pods

list.label: Deployment Configuration
list.name: deploy_config
list.query: Standard : standard,HA : ha,QBT (non-HA) : qbt,HA + QBT : ha-qbt

list.label: Version
list.name: version
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN (label_values ? '__deployment_nightly') AND (label_values->>'__deployment_nightly')::BOOLEAN = true THEN 'nightly' ELSE (label_values->>'__deployment_version') END AS version FROM data WHERE horreum_testid = 418 AND label_values ? '__deployment_version' AND (label_values->>'__deployment_version') IS NOT NULL AND label_values ? '__results_PipelineRuns_signing_throughput' ORDER BY version

list.label: Test Total
list.name: test_total
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT (label_values->>'__parameters_test_total')::INTEGER AS test_total FROM data WHERE horreum_testid = 418 AND label_values ? '__parameters_test_total' ORDER BY test_total

title: Chains Signing Performance Dashboard
